title: Rabbi Aryeh Lebowitz Daf Yomi Shabbos Daf 03
text: Today's דף daf is שבת דף ג Shabbos Daf Gimmel . Today's שיעור shiur is sponsored in memory of a loved one. We thank the sponsor very much. So we continue מסכת שבת Maseches Shabbos and we are up to דף ג daf gimmel . Yesterday we ended with רב מתנה Rav Mattana asking about the eight cases versus twelve . The גמרא Gemara on דף ג daf gimmel opens by explaining the first section of the משנה mishna where both are פטור patur and מותר mutar is not taught . Then the גמרא Gemara asks: is there anywhere in שבת Shabbos where someone is פטור patur and מותר mutar ? And שמואל Shmuel says all פטורי paturei of שבת Shabbos are אסור assur except three: trapping a deer, trapping a snake, and draining an abscess . רב מתנה Rav Mattana says there should be twelve תרתי סרי , and the גמרא Gemara explains they only count פטור patur cases where you could come to a חטאת chatas . Then the גמרא Gemara asks about שנייהם פטורין shneihem peturin where a מלאכה melacha was done between them, and רבי Rebbi cites the verse מעם הארץ when he does one . רב Rav asks רבי Rebbi about הטעינו חבירו אוכלים someone loaded with food who carried out . On דף ג עמוד ב daf gimmel amud beis , אביי Abaye says it is obvious that ידו של אדם yado shel adam is not רשות הרבים reshus ha-rabim or רשות היחיד reshus ha-yachid . The big question of today's דף daf is ידו של אדם yado shel adam — what is the ruling if it becomes ככרמלית karmelis ? בעי אביי baaya Abaye: יד ככרמלית yad karmelis ? Did they קנסו kansu שוגג shogeg as מזיד mezid ? תא שמע ta shma: היתה ידו מלאה פירות hand full of fruit . Above ten tefachim or below ten . That is יד ככרמלית yad as karmelis , the title of today's שיעור shiur .
excerptSource: fixture-derived excerpt aligned to Sefaria Shabbat 3a-3b
